data.revised_prompt: Clean HD 2D game enemy concept art for a cultivation roguelite, single enemy only. A standard non-chibi ranged hostile unit: dark robed marksman / talisman caster / shaman-style combatant with normal simplified proportions, readable in small game size. Three-quarter RPG combat view, centered, full body visible, compact idle hostile stance, clear feet anchor, generous padding, subject occupies about 62% of the canvas. Hood or light helm, short crossbow or talisman launcher with an orb focus, one or two subtle bright blue cracks or arcane fissures on armor/robe accents. Style: polished fantasy RPG asset, clean hand-painted 2D concept, crisp silhouette, simplified details, reduced ornament complexity, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Lighting: cool rim light, restrained magical glow, readable contrast. Palette: charcoal black, muted steel, electric blue highlights, a little cyan; avoid magenta in the subject. Materials: robe cloth, dark metal accents, controlled arcane glow. Background must be a perfectly flat solid chroma-key #FF00FF only, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation. No UI, no text, no watermark, no giant spell circles, no many floating objects, no clutter, no giant cape, no boss-scale ornaments, no gore, no silly expression. Keep the silhouette compact and suitable for repeated ranged encounters.
